name: City-Ship Jericho || Stargate Atlantis RP
description:
"Look, the city, as you know, is just a giant spaceship..."

A city-ship, created by the Lanteans, sharing its name with the fabled city from the Bible.
With weapons for days, an interior space comparative to the size of Manhattan, and the capability for intergalactic travel, Jericho may well be the key to saving mankind from the inevitable destruction of Earth by the sun.
And you've been put in charge of it.

Have fun!

(Please note that this bot is a heavy WIP and does not contain all information about the Stargate universe. Do not assume it does and explain things in your messages if the bot does not understand to compensate.)

I am (probably) not going to update this bot. sorgy...
creator: Dreamgeinus2000
